questions.question: What does IoT stand for?
questions.description: IoT refers to connected physical devices that collect, send, or act on data.

questions.question: Which protocol is commonly used for lightweight IoT messaging?
questions.description: MQTT is a lightweight publish-subscribe protocol often used by IoT devices.

questions.question: Which security issue is common in unmanaged IoT devices?
questions.description: Default credentials are a frequent cause of IoT compromise.
